description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips

We paid $5 for a wooden jewelry box at a kitchen-counter sale and walked out with a stack of vintage watches and a drawer of mystery jewelry — and that was just one of nine garage sales we hit before lunch.

In this 17-minute Friday haul Lonnie and Candice run nine sales in four hours and come home with the $5 jewelry box (vintage Seiko, Citizen, Lady Elgin, Pulsar, and Fossil watches plus a drawer crammed with charms and earrings — at least one piece might actually be gold), a $150 Louisiana brewery tap handle collection (Nola Brewing's Hapulus IPA + Darkest Before Dawn, Cinjun's Bayou Brunette, Rebirth Brass Band, Bell's Inspired Brewing, Beeta Brewing's "Big Easy" art-deco fleur-de-lis), a $40 lot of about 100 vintage sci-fi paperbacks, a Sailor Jerry tiger metal sign Candice is keeping, brewery wood signs, brand-new Bear Trap slippers, a Harajuku Mini backpack, and a pair of rare Yru Gloomy Bear platform shoes that should pull $100+ on resale.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 The Score Day Intro (9 Sales in 4 Hours)
00:26 Vintage Sci-Fi Paperback Lot ($40 for 100+ Books)
01:30 Massive Louisiana Tap Handle Collection ($150)
05:06 Sailor Jerry Tiger Sign + Brewery Wood Signs
07:38 The $5 Jewelry Box Score (Watches Inside!)
09:00 Drawer of Mystery Jewelry — Could There Be Gold?
12:13 Culver Glassware + Stitch Plushies
13:01 Gola Shoes + Monster High Puzzles
14:04 Bear Trap Slippers + Harajuku Mini Backpack
15:18 Yru Gloomy Bear Platform Shoes (Rare Find)
16:30 Wrap-Up

Thanks for hanging out in the shed with us. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see you in the next one. And if you want to get your name in the outro credits, the Shed Heads channel membership is $1.99/month — link below.

#reselling #ebay #garagesale #thrifting #shedflips

chapters.title: The Score Day Intro (9 Sales in 4 Hours)
Vintage Sci-Fi Paperback Lot ($40 for 100+ Books)
Sailor Jerry Tiger Sign + Brewery Wood Signs
Drawer of Mystery Jewelry — Could There Be Gold?
Bear Trap Slippers + Harajuku Mini Backpack
Yru Gloomy Bear Platform Shoes (Rare Find)

fulltitle: We Bought 30+ Beer Tap Handles for $150
